name: VinSolutions Automotive Dealer CRM API
what_it_does: VinSolutions (Cox Automotive) automotive dealer CRM REST API for vehicle sales lead management, customer communication, and dealership sales process automation. Enables AI agents to manage sales lead creation and routing for automotive dealer lead management automation, handle customer contact and follow-up scheduling for sales CRM automation, access vehicle inventory linking and search for lead-to-inventory matching automation, retrieve deal desking and pencil integration for F&I workflow automation, manage service appointment scheduling and service CRM for service lane automation, handle email and SMS customer communication templates for dealer marketing automation, access conquest and portfolio marketing for dealer CRM campaign automation, retrieve sales manager reporting and activity tracking for dealership performance automation, manage BDC (business development center) workflow and callback tracking for inbound lead handling automation, and integrate VinSolutions with Cox Automotive inventory platforms, DealerSocket, and OEM lead management systems for omnichannel automotive CRM.
use_cases: Routing vehicle leads from dealer BDC automation agents
Following up with prospects from sales CRM agents
Matching inventory from lead-to-vehicle automation agents
Scheduling service from service CRM automation agents
not_for: Dealer parts inventory and ordering (use Reynolds & Reynolds or CDK)
Auto finance and F&I deal funding
best_when: A franchised or independent automotive dealer wanting AI agents to automate lead management, customer follow-up, inventory matching, and BDC workflow within VinSolutions as the dealer CRM platform.
avoid_when: TCPA CONSENT FOR SMS AND PHONE OUTREACH: Automated customer outreach via VinSolutions SMS and calling requires TCPA-compliant prior express written consent; automated BDC dialing or texting without verified consent creates TCPA class action exposure; implement consent capture and verification before automated customer communication. LEAD EXCLUSIVITY AND OEM LEAD PROGRAM COMPLIANCE: Automated lead routing via VinSolutions for OEM-branded leads (GM Conquest, Ford Lead Management) must comply with OEM dealer agreement lead handling requirements; automated lead assignment to non-certified process creates OEM program compliance violation. GDPR FOR EU CUSTOMER DATA IN US CRM: VinSolutions is a US-based CRM; automated customer data from EU prospects (cross-border vehicle buyers, international relocation) stored in US CRM without GDPR data transfer mechanism creates EU data protection exposure.

auth.notes: VinSolutions uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Overland Park, Kansas HQ (Cox Automotive subsidiary). VinSolutions founded 2006. Acquired by Cox Automotive 2011. Part of Cox Automotive suite (Autotrader, Kelley Blue Book, Dealertrack, Manheim). 10,000+ dealer rooftops. Dealer CRM with BDC, service lane, and marketing automation. Partners with OEM lead programs (Toyota, Ford, GM, FCA). Competes with eLead, DealerSocket (Solera), and Reynolds & Reynolds CRM for automotive dealer CRM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per dealer rooftop
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per dealership; module pricing for BDC, service CRM, and marketing automation; API access in enterprise tier
pricing.notes: Overland Park KS (Cox Automotive). Annual subscription per dealer rooftop. Cox Automotive suite pricing. 10,000+ dealer customers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; lead and customer queries throttled; webhooks for lead and appointment events

known_agent_gotchas: TCPA CONSENT REQUIRED FOR AUTOMATED OUTREACH: Automated SMS texting and phone dialing via VinSolutions BDC integration requires documented TCPA prior express written consent per customer; automated outreach without consent verification creates TCPA class action exposure; implement consent capture at lead intake before automated communication workflows

OEM LEAD PROGRAM HANDLING REQUIREMENTS: Automated lead routing for OEM-branded leads (Toyota, Ford, GM dealer lead programs) must comply with OEM-specific response time SLAs and handling procedures; OEM lead programs audit lead response time and process compliance; automated routing without OEM SLA compliance creates OEM program penalty and lead program suspension

COX AUTOMOTIVE SUITE IDENTITY FEDERATION: VinSolutions integrates with Cox Automotive inventory platforms (Dealer.com, DealerSocket); shared customer identity across Cox Automotive suite requires unified customer identity management; automated cross-platform customer data sync without unified ID mapping creates duplicate customer records and attribution errors

INVENTORY PRICE DISCREPANCY AT LEAD MATCHING: Automated lead-to-inventory matching via VinSolutions must check real-time inventory pricing and availability; inventory price changes (incentive updates, market adjustments) may occur between lead creation and automated customer communication; stale price in automated follow-up creates customer expectation mismatch at negotiation

DEALER ROOFTOP ISOLATION FOR MULTI-STORE GROUPS: VinSolutions multi-store dealer groups may have separate API credentials per rooftop; automated lead routing and reporting across dealer group must manage rooftop-specific credentials; cross-rooftop customer data access requires group-level API configuration

WEBHOOK EVENT ORDERING FOR LEAD STATUS: VinSolutions lead status change webhooks may arrive out of order for rapid status transitions (new → contacted → appointment); automated downstream workflow triggered on webhook must validate event sequence to prevent incorrect lead status processing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Automotive dealer CRM. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Customer prospect, vehicle purchase, and dealer sales data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Dealer CRM. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Customer PII, vehicle purchase intent, and sales data.
